docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, TONY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
